item.description: Opta Analyst US @OptaAnalystUS · 20min Updated Opta playoff probabilities heading into the final NBA Play-In Tournament games Friday night. 1 2 133

item.title:
OptaSTATS: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 3h Including playoffs, Mason Miller has struck out:
20 of his last 23 b
item.description:
Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 3h Including playoffs, Mason Miller has struck out:
20 of his last 23 batters 30 of last 38 40 of last 55 50 of last 70 60 of last 89 70 of last 109 80 of last 135
No other MLB pitcher in the last 50 years has matched any of those stretches at any point in his career (reg & post). San Diego Padres 2 57 278 8 mil

item.title: OptaSTATS: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 7h Today marks the first time there were multiple hat tricks (Matt Savoi
item.description: Opta Analyst US reposteó OptaSTATS @OptaSTATS · 7h Today marks the first time there were multiple hat tricks (Matt Savoie, Robert Thomas) on the final day of the NHL regular season since April 13, 1997 (Eric Daze, Jaroslav Svejkovsky). Edmonton Oilers 1 11 27 5 mil
